facebook.content_angle: The pre-race ritual edge: what elite swimmers do in the 60 minutes before hitting the blocks — visualisation, breathwork, and gear check as a confidence-building routine
facebook.post_text:
The 60 minutes before the blocks matter just as much as the race itself. 🎯

Elite swimmers don't wing race day. They follow a deliberate pre-race ritual — and it starts long before the warm-up.

Visualise your race. Your start, your turns, your finish. 🧠 Then run your breathwork. Slow it down, centre your focus, and turn those nerves into fuel.

**A confident athlete trusts their preparation — and their gear.**

When every detail counts, make sure your suit is working for you, not against you. Our Italian-crafted competition suits are built for athletes who leave nothing to chance. 🏆

Shop at VelocxNZ.co.nz
